saveNotificationPreferencesTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SettingsActivityTest
test to see if a user can opt out of notification categories and have the preferences persisted on their profile

scenario - Variable in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileDetailsActivityTest
 
searchByPhoneNumberTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SendPrivateEventActivityTest
verifies that searching for a user by phone number returns the matching profile
sendBatchNotification(String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepository
Sends a notification to a specific sub-group of an event's waitlist based on their status
sendCoOrganizerInvitation(String, String, String, List<UserProfile>) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepository
Sends invitations to be a coorganiser and creates tracking records in the event's sub-collection
sendInvitations(String, String, String, List<UserProfile>) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepository
Sends invitations for a private event and creates tracking records in the event's sub-collection filters users based on their private invite opt-in preference
sendMessage(MessageThreadItem, FirebaseUser, String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventMessageManager
sends a message in a thread and updates the thread preview information

Test if adding Coorganizer Creates a notification to the correct User
SendPrivateEventActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
activity for organizers to send invitations for private event allows searching for users and adding them to batch for notification

sendToSpecificUsers(String, String, String, String, List<String>) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepository
sends a notification to a specific list of user IDs records the notification in the global log and individual user inbox filters users based on their notification preferences

SettingsActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_settings screen this is the activity that allows a user to change their preference settings(when implemented) and account information allows a user to create an account and then navigates them to home activity also is where the user can delete their account
SettingsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SettingsActivity
 
SettingsActivityTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Tests the functionality of the SettingsActivity this activity allows a signed-in user to update their profile information
SettingsActivityTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SettingsActivityTest

Ensures user cannot sign up to an event that has passed its deadline
